research_notes: Found executive information on company page (https://www.acely.co.jp/company/). President message signed by 代表取締役社長 加藤美幸. News page mentions president transition notice dated 2024-12-05. Company established 1990, IT system integration. Motto: 誠実、行動、忍耐 and ウィン・ウィン. KIA member (神奈川県情報サービス産業協会 area).
